tasks.title: Add dedicated --surface-header design token (light + dark)
tasks.description: In packages/design-tokens: add surfaces.header (+ headerForeground if header ink needs pairing) OKLCH in src/tokens/colors.ts; map 'surface-header' (+ '-foreground') in src/themes/web-light.ts; add EXPLICIT dark override in src/themes/web-dark.ts for BOTH base and foreground (SPEC-308 lesson: dark does not re-derive foreground from light sibling). Do NOT touch --surface-warm. Regenerate dist/tokens.css via `pnpm --filter @repo/design-tokens build`. Tests: update src/generators/generate-css.test.ts.snap snapshot; add assertions in src/themes/web.test.ts for surface-header light+dark oklch strings. Exact l/c/h confirmed against the visual mockup at implementation.

subtasks.title: explicit dark base + foreground in web-dark.ts

tasks.title: Rewrite WaveHeader.astro visual band (Opt-B, remove SVG)
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/shared/ui/WaveHeader.astro: REMOVE the inline SVG bezier path + fill entirely. Render a solid band using var(--surface-header) with a clean straight bottom edge; keep a theme-aware bottom drop-shadow (reuse filter: drop-shadow(... var(--core-background))) for the compact/hidden edge. Preserve the paddingTop prop and the data-wave-* attributes (CSP: no inline style, drive via CSS vars/classes — SPEC-046). No behavior change in this task (static appearance only). Tests: no unit (Astro markup); visual coverage in T-018.

tasks.title: Extract pure header state-machine module + unit tests
tasks.description: Create a pure, framework-free module (e.g. apps/web/src/components/shared/ui/waveHeaderState.ts) exporting a nextWaveHeaderState({ scrollY, delta, accumulator, currentState, config:{EXPAND_AT,COMPACT_AT,HIDE_DELTA,REVEAL_DELTA}, lockedCompact, reducedMotion }) => { state:'expanded'|'compact'|'hidden', accumulator }. Encodes: expanded↔compact hysteresis (EXPAND_AT=8/COMPACT_AT=96); compact→hidden on accumulated downward delta ≥ HIDE_DELTA (never near top); hidden→compact on upward delta ≥ REVEAL_DELTA; hidden→expanded only via compact at top; RESET accumulator on direction change; lockedCompact pins compact + suppresses hidden; reducedMotion suppresses hidden. Tests (TDD, AAA): waveHeaderState.test.ts covering every transition, the direction dead-zone reset (anti-jitter, AC-3), locked-compact, and reduced-motion suppression.

subtasks.title: direction dead-zone accumulator + reset on flip

tasks.title: Wire 3-state machine into WaveHeader.astro (detail)
tasks.description: In WaveHeader.astro client script: consume waveHeaderState (T-003) from a rAF-throttled scroll+resize handler; toggle .wave-header--compact and a new .wave-header--hidden (translateY out) class; ONLY for paddingTop='detail'. Keep overflow-anchor:none on html:has(.wave-header) (compact still exists). Preserve the astro:before-swap cleanup + astro:after-swap reinit symmetry (no duplicate listeners across View Transitions). Read data-locked-compact + prefers-reduced-motion into the pure module inputs. Tests: behavior covered by T-003 unit + T-017 anti-trembling verify.

subtasks.title: rAF-throttled scroll/resize handler consuming pure module

tasks.title: Listing static-band path (no state machine)
tasks.description: Ensure paddingTop='listing' attaches NO scroll state machine and renders a fixed static band. Preserve ListingLayout.astro's hospeda:listing-nav same-path partial-swap contract (data-listing-swap='header'|'content'; the header DOM node must not be swapped/rehydrated on filter navigations). Tests: T-018 verifies listing static + filter partial-swap intact.

subtasks.title: guard state machine to detail only

tasks.title: Create shared HeaderBackButton.astro (history-aware)
tasks.description: New shared apps/web/src/components/shared/ui/HeaderBackButton.astro. History-aware: progressive-enhancement script calls history.back() when a same-origin document.referrer or history.state.index>0 exists, else falls back to an href pointing at the entity's parent listing (passed as prop, composed from routing only — NG-3-safe). Icon = ArrowLeftIcon from @repo/icons; i18n label ('Volver'). Model on the existing apps/web/src/components/contributions/ContributionBackLink.astro pattern. Tests: T-018 verifies both nav paths (history + href fallback).

subtasks.title: history-aware click handler w/ href fallback

tasks.title: Consolidate shared compact CSS + per-page override hatch
tasks.description: Move the common compact-mode rules (row collapse, font shrink, hide breadcrumb/rating/meta) into WaveHeader.astro as the shared default keyed off .wave-header--compact. Define a DOCUMENTED per-page override mechanism (a set of --wave-compact-* CSS vars and/or opt-in classes) so each entity header can still choose what it collapses. This is the single source the 8 consumers key against. Tests: per-entity behavior in T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate DetailHeader.astro (accommodation) + back button
tasks.description: apps/web/src/.../DetailHeader.astro: remove its local duplicated :global(.wave-header--compact) block, keep only genuine overrides via the T-007 contract; mount HeaderBackButton (T-006) left of the breadcrumb row. Verify badges/status pills/name/destination/rating still collapse correctly. Tests: T-018.

subtasks.title: remove local compact block, use shared contract

tasks.title: Migrate DestinationDetailHeader.astro + back button
tasks.description: Migrate to the shared compact contract (T-007); its genuine override = collapsing the attractions <ul> + meta. Mount HeaderBackButton. Tests: T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate EventDetailHeader.astro + back button
tasks.description: Migrate to shared compact contract (T-007); override = category badge + status pills + meta collapse. Mount HeaderBackButton. Tests: T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate PostDetailHeader.astro + back button
tasks.description: Migrate to shared compact contract (T-007). NOTE: this is the only header that also collapses a summary paragraph + engagement row — keep those as explicit overrides. Mount HeaderBackButton. Tests: T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate GastronomyDetailHeader.astro + back button
tasks.description: Migrate to shared compact contract (T-007). NOTE divergences: no outer align-items:center; favorite uses count/showCount props. Keep those. Override = type/price/new badges + location + rating collapse. Mount HeaderBackButton. Tests: T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate ExperienceHero.astro + back button
tasks.description: Migrate to shared compact contract (T-007). NOTE divergences: no price-badge (pricing via ExperiencePriceTag collapsed by .exp-hero__pricing); no outer align-items:center; favorite count/showCount. Mount HeaderBackButton. Tests: T-018.

tasks.title: Migrate ListingPageHeader.astro (7th consumer)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/components/shared/layout/ListingPageHeader.astro carries its own :global(.wave-header--compact) block (tagline/subtitle collapse, title font shrink). Since listing is now a STATIC band (no compact), reconcile: either drop the now-dead compact rules or align them to the shared contract. No back-button/favorite concerns here. Tests: T-018 listing verify.

subtasks.title: audit listing-page-header compact rules vs static band
drop dead compact CSS or align to shared contract

tasks.title: Update mapa.astro (8th consumer, locked-compact)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/mapa.astro force-locks the header via data-locked-compact + manual classList.add('wave-header--compact'), hides the wave SVG (:global(.wave-header__wave){display:none}) and reads --wave-bar-compact. Update: the SVG is gone (remove the now-dead hide rule); ensure locked-compact pins compact AND suppresses the new hidden state (header never slides out in the fullscreen-map UX); verify --wave-bar-compact is still exposed by the reworked component and the measured compact height is correct. Tests: T-018 map verify.

tasks.title: Re-derive the +105px sticky-sidebar constant
tasks.description: DetailLayout.astro and ListingLayout.astro both hardcode calc(var(--navbar-height,80px) + 105px) for the sticky sidebar top/max-height — an undocumented approximation of the compact band height. Re-derive from the NEW band/compact dimensions; prefer exposing the compact bar height as a CSS var (the map already reads --wave-bar-compact) and using it in both layouts instead of a second magic number. Tests: T-018 sidebar-offset verify at detail + listing.

subtasks.title: expose as CSS var + use in both layouts

tasks.title: Verify hide/reveal dead-zone (anti-trembling, AC-3)
tasks.description: AC-3 gate. Confirm the new hide/reveal direction layer does NOT re-introduce scroll trembling. Tune HIDE_DELTA/REVEAL_DELTA empirically (measured, not guessed) and confirm the overflow-anchor:none fix is still required with compact retained. Use the T-003 unit suite for the pure logic + Playwright/design-review to observe real scroll on a detail page (light+dark). Do NOT remove overflow-anchor handling until verified.

subtasks.title: confirm no trembling + overflow-anchor still needed

tasks.title: Cross-cutting verification (entities, themes, a11y, viewports)
tasks.description: design-review across viewports: 3-state model on all 6 detail entity types; light + dark; prefers-reduced-motion (hide/reveal disabled, header stays put); mobile compact fits one row (H1 truncates, favorite stays); listing static band + filter partial-swap intact; mapa locked-compact unbroken; back button both nav paths. Confirm the 8 compact consumers are all visually correct. Covers AC-6, AC-7.

subtasks.title: mobile compact one-row + listing static + map locked
